headline: Lennar Debuts Deer Creek Community in Lincoln, AL
summary: Lennar, one of the nation's leading homebuilders, today announced the grand opening of Deer Creek, a community of brand-new single-family homes designed for first-time homebuyers and growing households seeking comfort, value and small-town charm.

headline: Here’s What Improves Lennar Corporation’s (LEN) Long-Term Earnings Potential
summary: Third Avenue Management, an investment management company based in New York City, released its “Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund posted a return of +11.61% (after fees) in the calendar year, compared to the MSCI […]

headline: Lennar (LEN) Q1 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Lennar (LEN), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended February 2026.
